---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement, new feature, or documentation enhancement.
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the requested feature or improvement.

## Use case
Why is this feature useful? Who will it help?

## Proposed solution
If you have a specific approach in mind, describe it here.

## Alternatives considered
List any alternatives you considered, such as workarounds or existing features.
